tech_news.title: Apple introduces the new MacBook Air with M5 - Apple
tech_news.description: Apple today announced the new MacBook Air with M5, bringing exceptional performance and expanded AI capabilities to the world’s most popular laptop.

tech_news.title: Resident Evil Requiem’s ‘Final Puzzle’ Has Been Solved Without Datamining - Kotaku
tech_news.description: Now we know all the clues and steps to solve the game-long puzzle

tech_news.title: A Possible US Government iPhone-Hacking Toolkit Is Now in the Hands of Foreign Spies and Criminals - WIRED
tech_news.description: A highly sophisticated set of iPhone hijacking techniques has likely infected tens of thousands of phones or more. Clues suggest it was originally built for the US government.

tech_news.title: Google brings Android’s desktop mode to Pixel devices - The Verge
tech_news.description: The Pixel 8 and up will display a desktop-like experience when connected to an external monitor.

tech_news.title: Android’s Find Hub adds iPhone-like luggage tracking links - The Verge
tech_news.description: Google is launching a new luggage-tracking feature to its Find Hub, allowing you to provide airlines with a link to your missing bag’s location.

tech_news.title: Google’s latest Pixel drop allows Gemini to order groceries for you and more - The Verge
tech_news.description: Google is launching a big update for Pixel phones, and that includes the ability for its Gemini AI assistant to complete tasks for you, like ordering groceries or booking a ride.

tech_news.title: Marathon Confirms Seasonal Resets, Which Means Everyone's Gear, Contract and Faction Progression, and Player Level Wipe Every Few Months - IGN
tech_news.description: Bungie has outlined what to expect from Marathon upon launch, and confirmed plans for seasonal wipes that mean all players lose their gear every few months.

tech_news.title: The Division 10th Anniversary Showcase: The Division 2 Anniversary Season and Roadmap, The Division Resurgence Launch Date - Ubisoft
tech_news.description: The Division 2's Anniversary Season offers a limited-time Realism Mode, free access to the Warlords of New York expansion, new Tom Clancy Cosmetics, free permanent visual upgrades, and more.

tech_news.title: Apple’s rumored MacBook Neo, a lower-cost, colorful laptop, could launch this week - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: This would mark the first time Apple competes with cheaper hardware like the Chromebook.
